context_template:
Red Hat OpenShift AI is a platform for developing, training, deploying, and serving AI/ML models. It handles all stages of the AI/ML lifecycle, from data preparation to inference, with features like distributed workloads, data science pipelines, IDE integration, S3-compatible storage, and model serving (single and multi-model). OpenShift AI also supports accelerators (GPUs/TPUs), resource management, and user management.

ODS-CI is an open-source test automation framework for validating OpenShift AI deployments. Built on Robot Framework, it supports test automation for all platform components and integrates with CI/CD pipelines for automated testing. ODS-CI allows multi-environment support, Selenium integration for UI testing, and customizable configurations for various test scenarios.

Below is metadata and code from the ODS-CI project:

In the file located at {file_location}:

{file_code}

Here is the code for the {element_type}:

{code}
